item.title: Borrowing from central bank suicidal for economy: Fahmida
item.description: Fahmida Khatun, executive director of the Centre for Policy Dialogue (CPD), on Saturday warned that the government’s practice of borrowing from the central bank to meet budget deficits is ‘suicidal’ for the national economy....City & Local Guides

item.title: Self-sabotaging education?
item.description: LAST week, I was speaking online with some Bangladeshi students from Brisbane, Australia. I asked one of them, a sixth grader, whether she had gone to school that day. She said she had not, because classes at her school were suspended. The......

item.description: OVER the past week, heavy to very heavy rainfall in the upstream hills of Cherrapunji and Meghalaya, combined with ongoing rainfall within Bangladesh, has pushed large volumes of hill water into the haor basins of Sylhet and surrounding districts. item.title: New struggle of journalism in Bangladesh

item.description: PRESS freedom is often invoked as a badge of democratic legitimacy and governments routinely affirm their commitment to a free press, placing it at the centre of constitutional guarantees and international pledges. Yet the lived reality of journalism......
